title: Punch Off
description:
Two [gold]Punch Constructs[/gold] are duking it out and you see some treasure in between them...

Should you try to nab it?

options.title: Nab
options.description: Add [red]Injury[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Obtain a random [gold]Relic[/gold].

notes: [gold]Event Flow:[/gold] Two [gold]Punch Constructs[/gold] continuously attack each other in combat-like animations. The [gold]Nab[/gold] option attempts to grab treasure between them but backfires—you receive screen shake and a sound effect representing the counter-punch, then gain a random [gold]Relic[/gold] but add [red]Injury[/red] curse to your deck. The [gold]I Can Take Them[/gold] option enters full combat against both constructs. Victory yields greater rewards: a random [gold]Relic[/gold] and a random [gold]Potion[/gold]. [red]CRITICAL:[/red] After the combat encounter concludes (regardless of outcome), the run ends immediately—this is the final event of the Underdocks act.
